name: Personal Information Protection Act
description: British Columbia's private-sector privacy law (SBC 2003 c 63). One of three substantially-similar-to-PIPEDA provincial private-sector privacy acts (along with Alberta PIPA and Quebec's Act respecting the protection of personal information in the private sector).
relationToCloudSecurity: Applies to cloud-hosted systems handling personal information of BC residents within scope.
relationToAISecurity: Applies to AI systems processing personal information within scope.

license.notes: Queen's Printer License of British Columbia. Government-of-BC publication; redistribution and derivatives permitted under the QP License.

current_extraction.notes: Authoritative source is BC Laws consolidated XML at https://www.bclaws.gov.bc.ca/civix/document/id/complete/statreg/03063_01/xml (committed as pipa.xml). extract_bc_pipa.py parses the XML to produce per-section structured CSV/JSON (61 sections across 12 Parts).
